label: baseline
notes: cold-load failed in the run-all run (timeout interaction with first-paint of heavy mermaid/cytoscape code-split chunks) and was re-run standalone with success — its numbers are from that re-run.

idle-polling and tab-refocus were captured against an EMPTY company (no agents, no issues). The real polling/refocus storm only manifests with seeded data; these numbers establish a floor and will likely look much worse once the dashboard has agents to render.
